query: benefits of airbnb vs hotel for long stay

results.title: Airbnb vs. Hotel: Which Is Right for Your Next Trip?
results.snippet: For longer stays, Airbnbs often offer better value with kitchen access and separate living areas...

results.title: Is Airbnb or a Hotel Better for a Long-Term Stay?
results.snippet: Hotels offer consistency and service, while Airbnbs provide a more residential feel and better weekly rates...

ai_overview: For long-term stays (over a week), Airbnbs are generally preferred due to cost savings from weekly/monthly discounts and the availability of kitchens. Hotels are better if you prioritize daily cleaning, on-site gyms, and professional security.
related_questions: Is it cheaper to stay in an Airbnb for a month?
Do Airbnbs have better WiFi than hotels?
What are the risks of long-term Airbnb stays?
